prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐→推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）、临床医学（推荐）等理工科专业热度持续；甘肃2026年高考总考生约218700人，较2025年（约179817人）增长约21.6%，物理类估算约147623人（增21.5%），竞争加剧，、特 殊类型线475分；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，与甘肃省跨省距离较远；该校在甘肃招生占比约0.56%（2025年），属外省 招生比例偏低因素，地域偏好不显著。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 4596 → 10354 → 5055 → 4708 → 16472. In 2025, there was a significant gap (about 11,764 places lower than 2024). The normal range over the past four years is about 4600–5100, and the 2025 anomaly should not be used as a regular reference. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Gansu Science/Physics Category was 101 in 2021, 103 in 2022, 98 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 98 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 162, a substantial expansion of about 65% compared to 2025, which significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable at 24–27 in recent years), it is a top-tier comprehensive university in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving the Qianwei campus bathhouse safety incident (13 negative events), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. The 2025 admission anomaly signal is 'medium concern,' with ranking drops in provinces such as Jiangsu and Heilongjiang. Fifth-round discipline evaluation A+: Marxist Theory, Archaeology; A: Law, Chemistry, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Physics, Veterinary Medicine; A-: Philosophy, Political Science, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Electronic Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration. A total of 15 A- and above disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (highly recommended → recommended), Electronics/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended) and other science and engineering majors remain popular. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Gansu is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 2025 (about 179,817). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 147,623 (up 21.5%), intensifying competition. The special type line is 475 points. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, which is far from Gansu Province. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 0.56% (2025), a relatively low proportion for out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound in rankings after the 2025 gap anomaly, the upward push on rankings due to the 65% expansion, the intensified competition from the 21.5% increase in Gansu candidate numbers, the suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative public opinion, and the sustained appeal of the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Science/Physics Category will be about 21,427, with a range of 20,927–21,927.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20,927–21,927, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Automation, Communication Engineering, Accounting, etc.) as main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Artificial Intelligence) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Civil Engineering, Environmental) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<20,927), you can focus on reaching for top-tier Tier 1 majors. Given the ranking rebound after the 2025 gap, pay attention to the match between your actual ranking and the predicted range when applying.
